title: Finding
description: A single diagnostic finding from a code analysis run (agency/capabilities/analyze/_main.py; Spec 042). Linked via HAS_FINDING←Analysis; severity gates downstream improvement planning.

severity.description: Severity tier: 'fail' blocks merge; 'warn' flags; 'info' is advisory.

file.description: Relative path to the source file containing the finding.

line.description: Line number where the finding occurs.

evidence.description: Optional code excerpt or additional evidence from the analyzer.

risk_code.description: Spec 354 — decay-risk code this finding evidences ('R1'-'R6' code, 'T1'-'T6' test, or a defined custom 'Cx'); empty for a plain decidable finding.

source.description: Spec 354 — the Iron Law Source: the book/principle grounding the risk (e.g. 'Martin — Clean Architecture — Acyclic Dependencies Principle').

consequence.description: Spec 354 — the Iron Law Consequence: what decays if the finding is left unfixed.

remedy.description: Spec 354 — the Iron Law Remedy: the concrete corrective action.
